name: Tomato Chutney Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 oz tomatoes, with juice, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, mix the tomatoes, apple, onion, green pepper, raisins, lemon juice, brown sugar, lemon peel, garlic, red pepper flakes, and cinnamon. Stir to combine.
2. Cook, stirring, over medium-high heat until the mixture boils.
3. Sprinkle salt over the chicken breasts. Place the chicken in the tomato mixture.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook, stirring and turning frequently, about 15 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
5. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter. Spoon sauce over the chicken. Serve.
